subcodes.title: Words to Baha'is from Portland, spoken on 1912-10-16
subcodes.first_line: Alláh-u-Abhá! You are very welcome.... Because I longed to see you, I have shortened my visit to the country, and here am I.
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
